## Install in Chrome

1. Download the `chrome-unpacked.zip` file attached to this release.
2. Extract the ZIP to a permanent folder on your computer.
3. Open `chrome://extensions` in Chrome.
4. Enable **Developer mode**.
5. Select **Load unpacked** and choose the extracted folder containing `manifest.json`.
6. Complete the extension onboarding. Reload any LinkedIn tabs that were already open.

Chrome loads this extension from the extracted folder, so do not delete that folder after installation. GitHub installations do not update automatically; download and load each newer release when one becomes available.
